description: Visual Studio 2022 is open with the 'NginxLogAnalyzer' solution. Your goal is to build a high-performance regex log parser for Nginx access logs. Implement the Nginx combined log format parsing logic in LogParser.cs and ensure all tests in LogParserTests.cs pass. The application must process the log file at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\access.log, count the occurrences of each HTTP status code, and export the results as a JSON dictionary to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\status_summary.json.
